The following events took place in '''3961 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*Revan first accesses the [[Star Map]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*[[Lillia Venn]] is elected [[Grand Lord]] of the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] on [[Kesh/Legends|Kesh]].<ref name="Lost Tribe of the Sith: Purgatory">''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Purgatory]]'', which takes place in 3960 BBY, states that Lillia Venn had been elected a year earlier.</ref>

==Battles==
*Battle of Jaga's Cluster (between [[3960 BBY|this]] and [[3960 BBY|3960]] year)
*[[Liberation of Taris]] (between this and [[3960 BBY|3960]] year)

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
